.file-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(236, 239, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(255, 255, 255) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(255, 255, 255), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(255, 255, 255) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(255, 255, 255) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(255, 255, 255), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(255, 255, 255) 65%, transparent))

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(236, 239, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(236, 239, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(229, 233, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(236, 239, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(236, 239, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(235, 203, 139) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(236, 239, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(236, 239, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(236, 239, 244, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgba(236, 239, 244, 0.8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgba(236, 239, 244, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
